core_mechanism: shock formation (gradient-catastrophe singularity) in an inviscid Burgers/Hopf nonlinear hyperbolic transport equation governing the flow of a probability density, whose onset marks a critical transition with universal scaling exponents
brief_reason: The abstract studies a complex inviscid Burgers-Hopf equation for the flow of the eigenvalue distribution and shows a shock forms, whose critical behavior yields universal exponents characterizing the transition.
